2604.02967.title: FoE: Forest of Errors Makes the First Solution the Best in Large Reasoning Models
2604.02967.paper_summary: Recent Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) like DeepSeek-R1 have demonstrated remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks, exhibiting human-like patterns in exploring multiple alternative solutions. Upon closer inspection, however, we uncover a surprising phenomenon: The First is The Best, where alternative solutions are not merely suboptimal but potentially detrimental. This observation challenges widely accepted test-time scaling laws, leading us to hypothesize that errors within the reasoning path scale concurrently with test time. Through comprehensive empirical analysis, we characterize errors as a forest-structured Forest of Errors (FoE) and conclude that FoE makes the First the Best, which is underpinned by rigorous theoretical analysis. Leveraging these insights, we propose RED, a self-guided efficient reasoning framework comprising two components: I) Refining First, which suppresses FoE growth in the first solution; and II) Discarding Subs, which prunes subsequent FoE via dual-consistency. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks and six backbone models demonstrate that RED outperforms eight competitive baselines, achieving performance gains of up to 19.0% while reducing token consumption by 37.7% ~ 70.4%. Moreover, comparative experiments on FoE metrics shed light on how RED achieves effectiveness.
2604.02967.paper_summary_zh: 最近的大型推理模型（LRMs）如DeepSeek-R1在複雜推理任務中展現了卓越的成功，表現出類似人類的模式來探索多種替代解決方案。<lb/>然而，經過仔細檢查，我們發現了一個令人驚訝的現象：第一就是最好，其中替代解決方案不僅僅是次優，還可能是有害的。<lb/>這一觀察挑戰了廣泛接受的測試時間擴展法則，讓我們假設推理路徑中的錯誤與測試時間同時擴展。<lb/>通過全面的實證分析，我們將錯誤描述為一種森林結構的錯誤森林（FoE），並得出結論：FoE使得第一成為最好，這一點得到了嚴謹的理論分析的支持。<lb/>利用這些見解，我們提出了RED，一個自我引導的高效推理框架，包含兩個組件：I) 精煉第一，這抑制了第一個解決方案中的FoE增長；II) 丟棄子方案，這通過雙一致性修剪隨後的FoE。<lb/>在五個基準和六個主幹模型上的廣泛實驗表明，RED超越了八個競爭基準，實現了高達19.0%的性能增益，同時將令牌消耗減少了37.7%至70.4%。<lb/>此外，對FoE指標的比較實驗揭示了RED如何實現其有效性。
2604.02967.author: Kehan Jiang et.al.
2604.02967.authors: Kehan Jiang, Haonan Dong, Zhaolu Kang, Zhengzhou Zhu, Guojie Song
